creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
> 	delete all patches and scripts!!

Dirk--I don't see it mentioned in the Porter's Handbook, but on more than
one occasion I've seen messages on this list from committers who prefer a
note such as this over a diff which creates empty files.  I concur with
them.
-- 
Trevor Johnson
